title: PvP plus
description: Lightweight modpack for PvP, improving clarity and performance while keeping a near-vanilla feel.
body:
PvP plus is a clean, performance-focused modpack built for players who want the pure Minecraft feel with only the most essential improvements needed for smoother PvP.

This pack avoids heavy gameplay mods or visual redesigns. Everything stays close to vanilla, while a few carefully chosen mods enhance clarity, stability, and performance:

Slightly improved FPS

No major gameplay changes

No intrusive visuals

Just a sharp, near-vanilla PvP experience

Why this modpack?

⚡ Extremely lightweight
🎯 Vanilla-friendly
👁 Only essential PvP improvements
🔧 Easy to combine with shaders & packs
🧱 Keeps the original Minecraft atmosphere

Design Philosophy

A modpack built to support PvP performance without altering how Minecraft feels. Pure vanilla, just smoother and clearer.

Permissions

You may use parts of this modpack in your own projects as long as you credit the original creator.
